checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds GitHub evidence recording, real child PR evidence input, evidence-recorded branch plan output, GitHub-mode coordinator output, validation updates, tests, docs, and audit artifacts for issue 060.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: AC-105 through AC-114 are represented by child PR records, the record-github-evidence CLI command, GitHub evidence mode coordination, validation, test coverage, documentation, and audit artifacts.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The task is limited to controlled child branch and child PR evidence plus local scripts, deterministic repository artifacts, documentation, context, contract, scope, report, audit packet, and audit artifact.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The change does not add protected credentials, production configuration, billing, authentication implementation, authorization implementation, dependency installation, CI/CD security weakening, deployment automation, live Antigravity launch, live Claude Code launch, or child PR merge.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are listed in the final report and covered by the issue 060 scope manifest.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Branch orchestration validation, branch orchestration tests, CLI tests, standard validation, negative validation, smoke validation, and git diff check passed locally.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Child PR CI passed for PRs 56, 57, and 58. Parent PR CI evidence is pending until this branch is pushed and checks complete.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records child PR CI evidence, pending parent CI, open child PR status, and the fact that child PRs are not merged by this contract.

findings.evidence: The coordinator artifact uses GitHub evidence mode and marks integration ready from real child PR evidence, while child PRs remain open.
findings.recommendation: Use a later dedicated contract for child PR integration or cleanup after parent evidence lands.

unresolved_risks: Parent PR CI evidence is pending until GitHub checks run.
Child PRs remain open evidence records and are not merged by this contract.
